title: baccharis lewisii
intro: Baccharis lewisii, also known as Coyote Mint or New Mexico Broomweed, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, wounds, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Baccharis lewisii include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and support immune function, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. Baccharis lewisii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
